slash_commands.name: /load
slash_commands.purpose: Load a session or another model

slash_commands.name: /save
slash_commands.purpose: Save current session as a new named model

key_bindings.action: Wrap multi-line input (close with another triple-quote)

extension.summary: No plugin/skill/extension system. Customization is limited to Modelfiles (ollama create) and runtime /set overrides. There is no marketplace and no in-REPL MCP/agent layer.

available: ollama pull|list|ps|stop|rm|cp|show|create (model selected as a positional arg, NOT a --model flag)
REST API for external agent integration
